name: ticketsPorStatus
code: SELECT T.STATUS AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM TICKETS T WHERE ('{{mes}}' = '' OR SUBSTRING(T.CRIADO_EM, 1, 7) = '{{mes}}') AND ('{{status}}' = '' OR T.STATUS = '{{status}}') AND ('{{categoria}}' = '' OR T.CATEGORIA = '{{categoria}}') AND ('{{analista}}' = '' OR T.OWNER_NOME = '{{analista}}') AND ('{{urgencia}}' = '' OR T.URGENCIA = '{{urgencia}}') AND ('{{equipe}}' = '' OR T.EQUIPE = '{{equipe}}') AND ('{{origem}}' = '' OR T.ORIGEM_NOME = '{{origem}}') GROUP BY name ORDER BY value DESC
